landing.title: Welcome to DocAI
landing.subtitle: RAG chat over your PDFs — with citations, cost tracking, and evals you can actually see.
landing.footer: A portfolio project by Josue Cortes.
landing.signInToUpload: Sign in to upload a PDF.

chat.title: Chat
chat.hint: Ask about your ingested PDFs — answers are grounded in your documents, with citations.
chat.empty: Ask a question to get started.
chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.pdfHighlightNote: Jumps to the cited page. In-PDF highlight is supported in Chrome, Edge and other Chromium browsers.

search.title: Search
search.hint: Search your ingested PDFs. No chat — just retrieval, with the score behind every result.

upload.cta: Drop a PDF here or click to upload

settings.title: Settings
settings.hint: Bring your own Anthropic key to chat without the free-tier limits.
settings.byokHint: With your own key, chat runs on Claude and skips the daily quota, weekly trial lock, and project budget — your key pays for the calls.
settings.invalid: That doesn't look like an Anthropic key (it should start with "sk-ant-").
settings.securityNote: Stored only in this browser tab (sessionStorage), sent with each request, and cleared when you close the tab. We never save or log it.

out_of_credit.title: Out of credit
out_of_credit.body: The demo's API budget is exhausted for now. Add your own Anthropic key to keep chatting.

daily_limit.title: Daily limit reached
daily_limit.body: You've used your free messages for today. They reset at 00:00 UTC.

project_over_capacity.title: Demo at capacity
project_over_capacity.body: The demo hit its budget cap for now. Add your own key to continue, or come back tomorrow.

weekly_lock.title: Free trial ended
weekly_lock.body: Your 7-day free trial is over. Add your own Anthropic key to keep going, or get in touch.

invalid_byok.title: Invalid API key
invalid_byok.body: Anthropic rejected that key. Review it in settings and try again.

model_overload.title: Model busy
model_overload.body: The model is overloaded right now. Give it a moment and try again.

file_too_large.title: File too large
file_too_large.body: That PDF exceeds the size or page limit for your plan. Try a smaller file.

pdf_unparseable.title: Couldn't read the PDF
pdf_unparseable.body: This file looks scanned or image-only — there's no extractable text to work with.

network_error.title: Connection problem
network_error.body: The request didn't go through. Check your connection and try again.

storage_full.title: Storage full
storage_full.body: The demo's storage is full right now. Delete old files to free up space.
